name: Fork Guard
description: Blocks git push / gh pr create from OpenClaw fork repos when the diff contains private content (credentials, personal paths, channel IDs).

enabled.description: Enable or disable the fork-leak guard.

blockedRepos.description: Git remote URL substrings that trigger the diff scan. Defaults to ['kami-saia/openclaw'].

blocklist.description: Strings (plain or /regex/flags) to search for in the diff. Matches block the push.

upstreamRemote.description: Name of the upstream remote to diff against.

upstreamBranch.description: Branch on the upstream remote to diff against.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Master switch for the fork-leak guard.

blockedRepos.label: Monitored Repos
blockedRepos.help: Git remote URL substrings that activate the guard. Any push to a remote whose URL contains one of these strings is scanned.

blocklist.label: Blocklist
blocklist.help: Strings or /regex/flags patterns to search for in the diff. Any hit blocks the push and reports the offending file:line.

upstreamRemote.label: Upstream Remote
upstreamRemote.help: Name of the upstream remote to diff against (e.g. 'upstream', 'origin').

upstreamBranch.label: Upstream Branch
upstreamBranch.help: Branch on the upstream remote to diff against (e.g. 'main', 'develop').
